key_signals: 1d, 4h, and 15m trend regimes are all bullish, with price above the 15m EMA band and far above 4h/1d EMA100 plus the 7d AVWAP.
CVD is bullish on 15m, 4h, and 1d, and whale flow is net bullish across all three timeframes.
Bullish selling-exhaustion signals remain active on every timeframe, and 4h/1d bullish divergence still supports dip buying.
Price is holding just above the 4h value-area high around 2295.09, with layered support at 2295.09-2295.81, then 2278.81 and 2267.02.
Counterpressure is building from repeated buying exhaustion near 2302.99, bearish absorption around 2293.0, elevated VPIN, and overhead ask liquidity at 2313.34 and above.

stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: The daily backdrop is bullish and pressing the top of its 2267.02-2308.0 bracket after reclaiming daily value, but the 4h is still a conflicted compression under 2300.0/2308.0; on 15m, buyers are defending 2295.09 inside a tight trigger range, so the next move depends on whether that support can convert 2300.92-2308.0 into acceptance or fail back into the 4h value area.

conflicting_signals: Sell stacks are layered above at 2300.81-2301.45, and the order-book imbalance is still slightly offer-heavy.
VPIN is elevated at 0.67, so short-term breaks can get unstable.
15m.opportunity: Responsive long setups are favored while 2295.09 holds; acceptance above 2300.92 opens a retest of 2308.0.
15m.risk: If 2295.09 fails, the short-term auction can rotate to 2289.85 first, with 2274.2 as the deeper 4h value support.
supporting_signals: 15m CVD is bullish with a positive slope, and intraday OFI is positive with spot confirmation.
Bullish initiation at 2283.7 and selling exhaustion at 2275.74 show buyers responding on dips.
Whale flow is net bullish at roughly +68.17M notional.
Price is in a 15m bull EMA regime and sitting on a strong 2295.09 support cluster built from POC/VAL/RVWAP-1/TPO VAH.

conflicting_signals: Daily buying exhaustion is heavy into 2302.99/2308.0.
Daily absorption is still slightly net bearish.
2308.0 remains the swing-high and daily volume resistance capping immediate expansion.
VPIN is elevated, so failed upside acceptance can unwind sharply.
1d.opportunity: As long as 2267.02 holds, the daily trend remains positioned for continuation; acceptance above 2308.0 would break the current daily bracket higher.
1d.risk: A failed breakout at 2308.0 after repeated exhaustion can rotate the market back to 2267.02, and losing that exposes 2235.66 daily value support.
supporting_signals: Daily EMA regime is bullish; price is 19.29% above 1d EMA100 and about 1.21 daily RVWAP sigmas above weighted VWAP.
Daily selling exhaustion is strongly bullish, and bullish divergence outweighs bearish divergence.
Daily CVD is bullish and whale flow is strongly net bullish at roughly +444.18M notional.
Price is above the daily TPO VAH at 2294.44 and holding the 2267.02 structural support/POC zone.

conflicting_signals: Bearish buying exhaustion is concentrated near 2302.99.
Bearish absorption around 2293.0 shows active seller response into the upper part of the bracket.
The auction is compressed under 2300.0 and still below the 2308.0 swing high.
OBI is negative and major ask walls sit at 2313.34 and 2325.78.
4h.opportunity: The main setup is a 4h range expansion: if 2295.81/2295.09 keeps holding and price accepts above 2300.0, the move can extend toward 2308.0 and then 2313.34.
4h.risk: If the compression rejects and price loses 2278.81, the auction can slide back to 2274.2 and invalidate the immediate upside continuation setup.
supporting_signals: 4h hidden bullish divergence is strong, and selling exhaustion remains bullish.
4h CVD is bullish, whale flow is net bullish at roughly +194.31M notional, and the EMA regime is bull with price 12.12% above 4h EMA100.
Price is holding above the 4h TPO VAH near 2295.09, with 2278.81 acting as the main structural support.
A fresh 4h bullish FVG at 2202.87-2235.13 confirms recent impulsive upside displacement beneath current price.
